zh.lifeSummary: 當Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod於0978年出生在烏克蘭Київська область時，他的父親St Volodymyr Svyatoslavich"The Great" Grand Prince of Kyiv18歲，母親Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire15歲。他於1019年與Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv在瑞典烏普薩拉烏普薩拉結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1054年2月20日在烏克蘭Київська областьВишгородський район享年76歲，埋葬在烏克蘭Київ。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod于0978年出生在乌克兰Київська область时，他的父亲St Volodymyr Svyatoslavich"The Great" Grand Prince of Kyiv18岁，母亲Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire15岁。他于1019年与Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv在瑞典烏普薩拉烏普薩拉结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1054年2月20日在乌克兰Київська областьВишгородський район享年76岁，埋葬在乌克兰Київ。

nameMeanings.name: "The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄭, possibly based on its Hokkien or Teochew pronunciation, see   Zheng   1.

variants.name: Zheng
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jian, Yi, Bin, Hong, Hua, Li, Wei, Yong, Ting, Xin, Yan, Hui, Min, Hao, Shen, Da, Quan, Tian, Chong.

Mandarin form of the surname 鄭: from Zheng (鄭), the name of a state (located in part of present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) granted to You, the younger brother of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). The state of Zheng was annexed by the state of Han (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Wise"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a wise or learned person, from Middle English wise, wisse ‘wise’ (Old English wīs). This name has also absorbed Dutch Wijs and De Wijs, a nickname meaning ‘(the) wise’, and possibly cognates in other languages.
English: topographic name for someone who lived by the withies or willows, from Middle English withi, Old English wīthig ‘withy, willow’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weiss   ‘white’.

variants.name: Weiss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Gerhard, Fritz, Manfred, Egon, Armin, Arno, Gunther, Heinz.  Jewish Chaim, Moshe, Emanuel, Aron, Meyer, Mendel, Hyman, Isadore, Zvi, Shlomo.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for someone with white hair or a remarkably pale complexion, from Middle High German wīz, German weiss ‘white’. This surname is also found in Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, Slovenia, and Croatia, often as a German translation of a corresponding Slavic surnames, e.g. Slovenian Belec and Bele (see Belle ). It is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Denmark, and the Netherlands.

variants.name: Wiseman
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English wise ‘wise, discreet’ (see Wise 1) + man, also wise-man ‘wise, thoughtful, rational, skilled, or intelligent person, a cunning man’ (Old English wīs + mann). The name may also have been used ironically.

variants.name: Wyse
meanings: English and Irish (Waterford and Cork): mainly Irish and Scottish spelling of Wise . The name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was also Gaelicized as de Uidheas.

nameMeanings.name: Yaroslav
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: Prince Vladimir converts Kievan Rus' to Christianity.
Prince Vladimir's death leads Rurik princes into fratricidal war that continues until 1036.
Prince Yaroslav (the Wise) of Novgorod assumes throne of Kievan Rus'.
Prince Yaroslav the Wise ends fratricidal war and later codifies laws of Kievan Rus' into Rus'ka pravda (Justice of Rus').

en.lifeSummary: When Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod was born in 0978, in Kyiv, Ukraine, his father, St Volodymyr Svyatoslavich"The Great" Grand Prince of Kyiv, was 18 and his mother, Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire, was 15. He married Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv in 1019, in Uppsala, Uppsala, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 20 February 1054, in Vyshhorod, Kyiv, Ukraine, at the age of 76, and was buried in Kyiv, Ukraine.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod est né en 0978, à Kyiv, Ukraine, son père, St Volodymyr Svyatoslavich"The Great" Grand Prince of Kyiv, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv en 1019, à Uppsala, Uppsala, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 20 février 1054, à Vyshhorod, Kyiv, Ukraine, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Kyiv, Ukraine.

de.lifeSummary: Als Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod 0978 in Kyiv, Ukraine geboren wurde, war sein Vater St Volodymyr Svyatoslavich"The Great" Grand Prince of Kyiv 18 und seine Mutter Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire 15. Er hat 1019 in Uppsala, Uppsala, Schweden Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Februar 1054 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Vyshhorod, Kyiv, Ukraine und wurde in Kyiv, Ukraine begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod è nato il nel 0978 nel Kyiv, Ucraina, il suo padre, St Volodymyr Svyatoslavich"The Great" Grand Prince of Kyiv, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv nel 1019, nel Uppsala, Uppsala, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 20 febbraio 1054, nel Vyshhorod, Kyiv, Ucraina, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Kyiv, Ucraina.

ja.lifeSummary: Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorodが0978年にウクライナКиївська областьで生まれた時，父St Volodymyr Svyatoslavich"The Great" Grand Prince of Kyivは18歳，母Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empireは15歳であった。1019年にスウェーデンウップサラウップサラでAnna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyivと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1054年2月20日にウクライナКиївська областьВишгородський районで76歳で死去し，ウクライナКиївにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod(이)가 0978년 우크라이나 Київська область에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 St Volodymyr Svyatoslavich"The Great" Grand Prince of Kyiv(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1019년 스웨덴 업프사라 업프사라에서 Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1054년 2월 20일 우크라이나 Київська область Вишгородський район에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 우크라이나 Київ에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod nasceu em 0978, em Kyiv, Ucrânia, seu pai, St Volodymyr Svyatoslavich"The Great" Grand Prince of Kyiv, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv em 1019, em Uppsala, Uppsala, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1054, em Vyshhorod, Kyiv, Ucrânia, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Kyiv, Ucrânia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod родился в 0978 г. в местности Киевская область, Украина, его отцу по имени St Volodymyr Svyatoslavich"The Great" Grand Prince of Kyiv было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv в 1019 г. в местности уппсала, уппсала, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 20 февраля 1054 г. в местности Вышгородский район, Киевская область, Украина в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности Киев, Украина.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod nació en 0978, en Kyiv, Ucrania, su papá, St Volodymyr Svyatoslavich"The Great" Grand Prince of Kyiv, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv en 1019, en Uppsala, Uppsala, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1054, en Vyshhorod, Kyiv, Ucrania, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Kyiv, Ucrania.
